description: Collaborative BrAPI v2.1 MCP workspace — studies, germplasm, genotypes across Breedbase, T3, more.
name: io.github.cyanheads/brapi-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Default BrAPI v2 base URL. Optional — connections can be opened at runtime via the brapi_connect tool instead.
environmentVariables.name: BRAPI_DEFAULT_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Opt-in flag for the write surface (brapi_submit_observations). Off by default — the tool is omitted from tools/list unless the operator opts in.
environmentVariables.name: BRAPI_ENABLE_WRITES

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
